scripts.db:migrate: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); const {Pool}=require('pg'); const fs=require('fs'); const pool=new Pool({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL,ssl:{rejectUnauthorized:false}}); pool.query(fs.readFileSync('lib/schema.sql','utf8')).then(()=>{ console.log('✅ Schema migrated'); pool.end(); }).catch(e=>{ console.error('❌',e.message); pool.end(); process.exit(1); });"
scripts.db:seed: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); const {Pool}=require('pg'); const fs=require('fs'); const pool=new Pool({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL,ssl:{rejectUnauthorized:false}}); pool.query(fs.readFileSync('lib/seed.sql','utf8')).then(()=>{ console.log('✅ Seed data inserted'); pool.end(); }).catch(e=>{ console.error('❌',e.message); pool.end(); process.exit(1); });"
